games.title: Grow A Garden Unblocked
games.tagline: Grow a Garden is the cozy farming hit: plant seeds, water crops, harvest produce and reinvest your profits into rarer seeds and a bigger garden.
games.controls: WASD to move, mouse or E to interact with plots, shops and tools
games.objective: Grow and sell crops to build the most valuable garden you can.
tips: Plant fast-growing crops first for quick early cash flow.
Reinvest in better seeds instead of hoarding coins.
Check the shop regularly — stock rotates and rare seeds sell out.
Weather events can boost crop value, so harvest at the right time.

games.title: Steal A Brainrot Unblocked
games.tagline: Steal a Brainrot is the chaotic collection game: buy bizarre brainrot characters that generate cash, defend your base — and raid other players' bases to steal theirs.
games.controls: WASD to move, E to interact, grab and deposit
games.objective: Build the richest base by collecting brainrots, earning cash and stealing from rivals before they steal from you.
tips: Upgrade base defenses before you get rich — wealthy bases get raided first.
Scout a base's layout before committing to a steal.
Deposit your earnings quickly; cash on hand is cash at risk.
Rare brainrots pay for themselves fast if you can keep them safe.

games.title: Minecraft Java
games.tagline: Minecraft is the sandbox phenomenon: mine blocks, craft tools, build anything and survive the night in an infinite procedurally generated world.
games.controls: WASD to move, mouse to look, left-click to mine/attack, right-click to place/use, E for inventory, Space to jump
games.objective: Gather resources, craft gear, build shelter and survive — or just build whatever you imagine.
tips: Punch a tree first; wood makes your first crafting table and pickaxe.
Dig down for stone to upgrade from wooden tools on day one.
Never dig straight down — lava and caves are unforgiving.
Light your shelter with torches so monsters don't spawn inside.

games.title: Slope
games.tagline: Slope is a lightning-fast 3D endless runner: steer a neon ball down an endless slope packed with red blocks, moving walls and sudden drops while the speed keeps climbing.
games.controls: Left/Right arrow keys or A/D to steer the ball
games.objective: Roll as far as you can without falling off the edge or smashing into red obstacles. Your score is the distance you survive.
tips: Stay near the middle of the track so you have room to dodge in either direction.
Tap the keys instead of holding them — oversteering causes most falls.
Only take yellow speed-boost pads when you can see the track ahead.
At high speed, watch the horizon and react to obstacles before they get close.

games.title: Slope 2
games.tagline: Slope 2 keeps the same high-speed downhill ball rolling as the original and adds moving obstacles, twisting tunnels and brand-new tracks.
games.controls: Left/Right arrow keys or A/D to steer
games.objective: Survive as far as possible down faster, trickier slopes while dodging red blocks and gaps.
tips: The tunnels hide obstacles — enter them centered and straight.
Moving red blocks have a rhythm; watch one full cycle before committing.
Short taps beat long holds at max speed.
Don't chase gems into risky lines — survival scores more.

games.title: Ovo
games.tagline: OvO is a slick stickman parkour platformer built around momentum: run, jump, slide, wall-jump and dive through minimalist levels to reach the flag.
games.controls: Arrow keys to run, Up to jump, Down to slide or smash, Down mid-air to dive
games.objective: Reach the flag at the end of every level. Faster finish times earn better ratings and unlock new skins.
tips: Slide right before a jump to launch a much longer slide-jump.
Diving mid-air (Down) converts height into horizontal speed.
Wall-jump by pressing jump as you touch the wall — chain them to climb shafts.
Coins are optional; learn the level first, then route a coin run.

games.title: Ovo 2
games.tagline: OvO 2 expands the momentum parkour formula with new levels, new mechanics and tighter speedrun routing for fans of the original.
games.controls: Arrow keys to move, Up to jump, Down to slide, smash and dive
games.objective: Clear each level and reach the flag, chaining slides and dives to keep maximum speed.
tips: Every level is designed around slide-jumps — master them early.
If a gap looks impossible, you probably need a dive first.
Replay levels to find skip routes; most have one.
Keep momentum through checkpoints instead of stopping.

games.title: Subway Surfers
games.tagline: Subway Surfers is the classic endless runner: dodge trains, leap barriers and outrun the inspector through colorful subway tracks while grabbing coins and power-ups.
games.controls: Arrow keys: Left/Right to change lanes, Up to jump, Down to roll
games.objective: Run as far as possible, complete missions and chase a new high score while the speed keeps rising.
tips: Stay on top of trains whenever you can — the view up there is clearer.
Save your hoverboard for high speeds; it absorbs one crash.
Finish mission sets to raise your score multiplier permanently.
Grab jetpacks and coin magnets over mystery boxes.

games.title: Snow Rider 3D
games.tagline: Snow Rider 3D is a downhill sledding game: weave between trees, snowmen and cliffs on a snowy mountain and collect gifts to unlock new sleds.
games.controls: Left/Right arrows or A/D to steer, Up to jump
games.objective: Ride as far down the mountain as you can without crashing.
tips: Look ahead down the slope, not at your sled.
Make small steering corrections — big swings cause wipeouts.
Hit ramps straight-on or you'll clip the edge.
Gifts are tempting, but a live run beats a risky grab.

games.title: Run 3
games.tagline: Run 3 sends a little alien sprinting through crumbling space tunnels where you can rotate the entire tunnel to run on walls and ceilings.
games.controls: Left/Right arrows (or A/D) to move, Up or Space to jump; touching a wall rotates the tunnel
games.objective: Get through each tunnel without falling into space. Explore mode unlocks new characters; Infinite mode tests your endurance.
tips: Look two tiles ahead — crumbling tiles give almost no warning.
Rotate early: running onto a wall mid-jump changes your landing completely.
Unlock and try different characters; the Skater handles ice far better.
In Infinite mode, play safe routes instead of chasing cells.

games.title: Tiny Fishing
games.tagline: Tiny Fishing is a chill idle fishing game: cast your line, steer the hook past small fish to the deep, then catch as many as you can on the way up.
games.controls: Click to cast, move the mouse to steer the hook
games.objective: Catch fish to earn cash, then upgrade your max depth, hook size and offline earnings to find rarer species.
tips: Upgrade max depth first — the valuable fish live deep.
On the way up, sweep side to side to fill every hook slot.
Rare golden fish are worth chasing; common ones aren't.
Invest in offline earnings and the game pays you while you're in class.

games.title: Drift Boss
games.tagline: Drift Boss is a one-button drifting game on a floating road: hold to drift right, release to swing left, and try not to slide off into the sky.
games.controls: Hold Space or mouse button to drift right, release to steer left
games.objective: Drift around endless corners for as long as possible, collecting coins to unlock new cars.
tips: Tap in a rhythm rather than holding — the car turns harder the longer you hold.
Anticipate S-curves by starting the next turn early.
Stay near the middle; recovering from the edge wastes your margin.
New cars handle differently, so re-learn the timing after an unlock.

games.title: MotoX3M
games.tagline: Moto X3M is a physics bike game full of loops, explosives and insane jumps. Race the clock for a 3-star time on every track.
games.controls: Up/Down arrows to accelerate and brake, Left/Right to tilt the bike
games.objective: Reach the finish as fast as possible. Crashes cost time; stars unlock new bikes and levels.
tips: Front and back flips shave time off the clock — but only land them clean.
Feather the brake when landing steep jumps to avoid flipping.
Tap restart the instant a run goes bad; chasing 3 stars needs perfect lines.
Lean back on big ramps and lean forward on steep climbs.

games.title: Death Run 3D
games.tagline: Death Run 3D is a first-person reflex gauntlet: fly through neon tunnels at extreme speed and thread the gaps in walls that give you milliseconds to react.
games.controls: WASD or arrow keys to move within the tunnel
games.objective: Survive each course as long as possible at blistering speed.
tips: Look at the far end of the tunnel, not the wall in front of you.
Move in tiny corrections — at full speed a small input crosses the whole screen.
Learn each course's patterns; they're fixed, not random.
Turn off distractions — this game is 90% focus.

games.title: Temple Run
games.tagline: Temple Run started the endless-runner craze: swipe through ancient temple paths, leap roots and fire traps, and outrun the demon monkeys behind you.
games.controls: Up to jump, Down to slide, Left/Right to turn at corners, A/D or tilt to shift sides
games.objective: Run as far as possible, collect coins and complete objectives to raise your multiplier.
tips: Upgrade the coin magnet power-up first for steady income.
Save resurrection wings for high-score runs.
Slide under fire traps — jumping over them usually ends badly.
Turn early at corners; the game buffers your input.

games.title: World's Hardest Game
games.tagline: The World's Hardest Game lives up to its name: guide a red square past swarms of blue dots, grab every yellow coin and reach the green zone across 30 brutal levels.
games.controls: Arrow keys to move
games.objective: Collect all yellow coins and reach the green exit zone without touching a single blue dot.
tips: Watch the dot pattern for a full cycle before you move.
Safe zones are your friends — stop, breathe, plan the next leg.
Move in short committed bursts, not hesitant drifts.
Deaths are information; every fail teaches you the timing.

games.title: Cluster Rush
games.tagline: Cluster Rush is first-person truck-surfing: sprint and leap across the roofs of speeding trucks in a convoy and don't touch the ground.
games.controls: WASD or arrows to move, Space to jump
games.objective: Jump from truck to truck and reach the finish without falling or getting thrown.
tips: Jump early — the trucks are moving faster than your reflexes.
Land on cab centers; edges throw you off.
Keep moving forward; standing still gets you crushed by the next truck.
Watch for turning trucks — they tilt before they swerve.

games.title: Getaway Shootout
games.tagline: Getaway Shootout is a chaotic ragdoll race: hop your wobbly character across rooftops and tracks, grab guns and power-ups, and reach the getaway vehicle first.
games.controls: W and E to hop left and right, R to use your held weapon or power-up
games.objective: Beat three rivals to the helicopter, car or train at the end of each map.
tips: Master the hop rhythm — alternating W/E fast is quicker than big jumps.
Grab any weapon early; knockback wins close races.
Save your power-up for the final stretch to the vehicle.
Knocking rivals off high platforms sets them back further than shooting them.

games.title: Basketball Stars
games.tagline: Basketball Stars is a fast 1v1 streetball game with dunks, blocks, steals and three-pointers — outplay the CPU or a friend in quick matches.
games.controls: Arrow keys to move, Z/X (or the on-screen keys) to shoot, steal, dash and block
games.objective: Score more than your opponent before the clock runs out.
tips: Pump fake first — defenders jump early, leaving an open drive.
Time your jump for blocks at the peak of their shot.
Use dash to recover on defense after getting beaten.
Corner threes are the highest-percentage outside shot.

games.title: 1V1.LOL
games.tagline: 1v1.LOL is a build-and-fight shooter where you throw up walls, ramps and floors mid-battle. Play 1v1 duels, box fights or battle royale against real players.
games.controls: WASD to move, mouse to aim/shoot, Z/X/C/V to build walls, ramps, floors and roofs, Space to jump
games.objective: Eliminate your opponent before they eliminate you. Win rounds by out-building and out-aiming the other player.
tips: Learn to place a ramp with a wall in front of it — that one move wins most fights.
Take and hold high ground; fighting downward is always easier.
Practice editing builds in the free build mode before queueing.
Don't spam builds — each piece has a cooldown that good players punish.

games.title: Infinite Craft
games.tagline: Infinite Craft is the viral crafting sandbox: start with Water, Fire, Earth and Wind, drag them together and discover everything from Steam to entire civilizations.
games.controls: Drag and drop elements onto each other to combine them
games.objective: Discover as many new elements as you can — including rare 'First Discoveries' nobody else has found.
tips: Combine opposites: fire+water, earth+wind — opposites unlock branches fast.
Revisit basic elements whenever you find something new.
Use the search box instead of scrolling a huge inventory.
Try combining an element with itself; it works more often than you'd think.

games.title: Cookie Clicker
games.tagline: Cookie Clicker is the original idle game: click a giant cookie, then spend cookies on cursors, grandmas and factories that bake for you around the clock.
games.controls: Mouse: click the big cookie, click buildings and upgrades to buy them
games.objective: Bake as many cookies as possible and build an ever-growing automated cookie empire.
tips: Early on, buy the cheapest building each time — CpS scales faster that way.
Always click golden cookies; their bonuses stack with everything.
Buy 'double CpS' upgrades as soon as they appear.
Leave the tab open — idle production does most of the work.

games.title: BitLife
games.tagline: BitLife is a life simulator: make choices from birth to death — school, careers, relationships, lottery tickets and mischief — and see how the story ends.
games.controls: Mouse: click through menus and choices
games.objective: Live the life you want: get rich, start a family, become famous — or chaos it all and try again.
tips: Study hard as a kid; scholarships unlock high-paying careers.
Keep Smarts and Health high with the library and gym each year.
Start saving early — compound money buys houses and businesses later.
Ribbon achievements reward very different lives, so experiment.

games.title: Fireboy and Watergirl
games.tagline: Fireboy and Watergirl is the co-op puzzle classic: guide two characters through temple levels using their opposite elemental powers — alone or with a friend on one keyboard.
games.controls: Arrow keys for Fireboy, WASD for Watergirl
games.objective: Get both characters to their matching doors, collecting diamonds. Fire hurts Watergirl, water hurts Fireboy, and green goo hurts both.
tips: Move one character at a time on tricky sections; park the other somewhere safe.
Use one character to hold levers and buttons for the other.
Grab the red diamonds with Fireboy and blue ones with Watergirl.
Perfect runs need every diamond — scout the level first.

games.title: Pacman
games.tagline: Pac-Man is arcade royalty: clear the maze of pellets while four ghosts hunt you down, then turn the tables with a power pellet.
games.controls: Arrow keys to move through the maze
games.objective: Eat every pellet in the maze without getting caught by Blinky, Pinky, Inky or Clyde.
tips: Learn ghost behavior: Blinky chases you directly, Pinky tries to cut you off.
Clear the maze corners early — they're death traps later.
Save power pellets for when ghosts corner you.
Side tunnels slow ghosts down; use them to escape.

games.title: Stickman Hook
games.tagline: Stickman Hook is a one-button swinging game: latch onto hooks, build momentum through the air and fling your stickman to the finish line.
games.controls: Hold Space or mouse button to grapple, release to fly
games.objective: Swing through every level and cross the finish line without falling.
tips: Release at the forward peak of the swing for maximum distance.
You don't need every hook — skipping one is often faster.
Bounce pads preserve momentum; land on them when possible.
Short taps give fine control on tight sections.

games.title: Monkey Mart
games.tagline: Monkey Mart is a cute management game where your monkey runs a supermarket: plant crops, stock shelves, ring up customers and expand the store.
games.controls: WASD or arrow keys to move — your monkey works automatically when standing at a station
games.objective: Grow the mart by keeping shelves stocked and customers happy, unlocking new aisles and products.
tips: Never let bananas run out — they're the fastest seller.
Hire helpers as soon as you can afford them; automation scales.
Upgrade movement and carry speed early.
Save for the next aisle unlock before buying decorations.

games.title: Drift Hunters
games.tagline: Drift Hunters is a 3D drifting sim with licensed-style tuner cars, deep upgrades and real physics. Chain long slides to earn cash and unlock better machines.
games.controls: WASD or arrow keys to drive, Space for handbrake, C to change camera
games.objective: Drift through tracks to build score multipliers, earn cash, then buy and tune new cars.
tips: Initiate drifts with a quick handbrake tap, then balance the throttle.
Chain corners without straightening to keep the multiplier alive.
Upgrade turbo and weight reduction before buying new cars.
If you spin, you're entering too fast — brake earlier, drift longer.

games.title: Rooftop Snipers 2
games.tagline: Rooftop Snipers 2 is a two-button physics duel: jump and shoot to knock your opponent off the roof with pistols, tomahawks and beach balls.
games.controls: W to jump, E to shoot (Player 2 uses arrow keys/O)
games.objective: Win rounds by knocking the other sniper off the rooftop — first to the round target wins.
tips: Shoot while your opponent is mid-jump; they can't dodge.
High arcs get more knockback than flat shots.
Watch for stage hazards like wind and moving platforms.
Jumping changes your hitbox — mix it up when you're losing duels.

games.title: The Impossible Quiz
games.tagline: The Impossible Quiz is 110 questions of pure trickery where the obvious answer is always wrong. Think sideways, expect puns and guard your three lives.
games.controls: Mouse to click answers — and sometimes the question itself
games.objective: Answer every question without losing all three lives. Skips help, but you need them all for the end.
tips: Read questions literally — wordplay beats logic here.
Some answers are hidden in the question text or the screen itself.
Memorize answers after each failure; progress is pattern knowledge.
Save your skips; the final questions demand them.

games.title: Bloons TD
games.tagline: Bloons TD is the tower-defense classic: place dart monkeys, tack shooters and cannons along the path and pop every balloon before it escapes.
games.controls: Mouse: select and place towers, upgrade them between rounds
games.objective: Stop every wave of Bloons from reaching the end of the track.
tips: Place towers where they cover the most path — bends are prime real estate.
One upgraded tower beats two basic ones at the same cost.
Lead Bloons need bombs or fire; plan for them before round 28.
Save cash for the big rounds instead of over-buying early.

games.title: Bloxorz
games.tagline: Bloxorz is a spatial puzzle classic: roll a 1x1x2 block across floating platforms and drop it upright into the square hole without tumbling off the edge.
games.controls: Arrow keys to roll the block one space at a time
games.objective: Stand the block upright on the exit hole across 33 levels of switches, bridges and fragile tiles.
tips: Remember the block covers two tiles when lying down — most falls come from forgetting that.
Plan the last two moves first: the block must arrive upright.
X-switches need the block standing; O-switches work either way.
Orange tiles break if the block stands on them — cross them lying down.

games.tagline: 2048 is the elegant number puzzle: slide tiles, merge matching numbers and chase the elusive 2048 tile on a 4x4 grid.
games.controls: Arrow keys to slide all tiles in one direction
games.objective: Merge tiles to reach 2048 — then keep going for a high score.
tips: Keep your biggest tile locked in one corner and never move it.
Build your second-biggest tile next to the corner tile.
Avoid moving up (or whichever direction frees the corner) unless forced.
Think in chains: 2-4-8-16 lined up merges beautifully.

games.title: Eggy Car
games.tagline: Eggy Car puts a raw egg on your roof and dares you to drive over hills without letting it fall and crack. Simple controls, brutal physics.
games.controls: Right arrow/D to accelerate, Left arrow/A to brake or reverse
games.objective: Drive as far as possible while keeping the egg on the car. Distance is your score.
tips: Tiny throttle taps keep the egg settled; speed is the enemy.
Slow down before every hill crest — that's where eggs launch.
If the egg starts bouncing, stop completely and let it settle.
Grab power-ups like the egg freeze when they appear.

games.title: Getting Over It
games.tagline: Getting Over It is the legendary rage game: you are a man in a cauldron climbing a mountain with only a hammer, and one mistake can undo an hour of progress.
games.controls: Mouse only: move the hammer in arcs to push, pull and hook yourself upward
games.objective: Climb the mountain to the top. There are no checkpoints.
tips: Practice the 'pogo' — planting the hammer below you and launching upward.
Slow, deliberate swings beat panicked flailing after a slip.
Hook ledges gently; yanking the hammer throws you off.
Falls are part of the game — treat each one as route practice.

games.title: Crossy Road
games.tagline: Crossy Road is endless Frogger: hop across highways, rivers and train tracks one tap at a time while traffic, trains and eagles try to end the run.
games.controls: Arrow keys or click to hop forward; Left/Right to dodge sideways
games.objective: Hop as far as you can. Standing still too long summons the eagle.
tips: Never stop moving forward for long — the eagle is always coming.
Sideways hops dodge trains without losing ground.
Ride logs and lily pads at their rhythm, not yours.
Listen for train horns; they warn you before you can see the train.

games.title: Doodle Jump
games.tagline: Doodle Jump is the classic vertical climber: bounce from platform to platform up an endless notebook page, riding springs and dodging monsters.
games.controls: Left/Right arrows to move; you bounce automatically
games.objective: Climb as high as possible without falling off the bottom of the screen.
tips: Aim for springs and jetpacks — they're free altitude.
You wrap around screen edges; use it to reach far platforms.
Brown platforms break — land and leave immediately.
Shoot monsters (Up or Space) before landing near them.

games.title: Fnaf 1
games.tagline: Five Nights at Freddy's puts you in the night-guard chair: watch the cameras, manage limited power and keep the animatronics out of your office until 6 AM.
games.controls: Mouse: click cameras, door and light buttons
games.objective: Survive five nights. Doors and lights drain power — run out and you're defenseless.
tips: Power is the real enemy; use doors only when something is at them.
Check Pirate Cove (Foxy) regularly or he'll sprint at your door.
Listen for footsteps and breathing — audio tells you more than cameras.
Bonnie and Chica approach from different doors; track both.

games.title: Granny
games.tagline: Granny is the viral horror escape game: you're locked in Granny's house and have five days to find keys, tools and a way out while she hunts every sound you make.
games.controls: WASD to move, mouse to look, E to interact, crouch to stay quiet
games.objective: Escape the house within five days. Dropped items make noise — and Granny hears everything.
tips: Crouch whenever you move; walking loudly brings her to you.
Hide under beds and in wardrobes when you hear her coming.
Drop an item in one room to lure her away from where you need to go.
Learn where key items spawn — each run, route the house in your head.

games.title: Among Us Multiplayer
games.tagline: Among Us is the social deduction hit: finish tasks as a Crewmate and vote out the Impostors — or lie, sabotage and eliminate the crew as the Impostor yourself.
games.controls: WASD to move, E or Space to use, Q to kill as Impostor, mouse for tasks and voting
games.objective: Crewmates win by completing all tasks or ejecting every Impostor; Impostors win by eliminating the crew.
tips: As crew, move in groups — solo players are easy targets.
Fake tasks convincingly as Impostor: stand still for a believable duration.
Use cams and admin table to track movement.
Report bodies and share locations; information wins meetings.

games.title: Flappy Bird
games.tagline: Flappy Bird is the one-button phenomenon: flap a bird through gaps in green pipes. One pixel of contact ends the run — and your patience.
games.controls: Click, tap or Space to flap upward
games.objective: Fly through as many pipe gaps as possible without touching anything.
tips: Find a steady flap rhythm and hold it instead of reacting late.
Stay in the lower-middle of the screen for the best angles.
Flap before the gap, not inside it.
Take breaks — tilt makes this game genuinely harder.

games.title: Happy Wheels
games.tagline: Happy Wheels is the infamous ragdoll physics game: guide Segway riders, wheelchair grandpas and irresponsible dads through lethally silly obstacle courses.
games.controls: Arrow keys to move, Space for the primary action, Shift/Ctrl for secondary actions
games.objective: Reach the finish line in one piece — or at least with the pieces you need.
tips: Slow is safe: most traps punish full speed.
Lean back on descents to avoid face-planting.
Eject (Z) before a bad landing to sometimes survive it.
Different characters trivialize different levels — swap around.

games.title: Tunnel Rush
games.tagline: Tunnel Rush hurls you through a spinning kaleidoscope tunnel full of barriers. Dodge at speed as the colors blur and the pace keeps rising.
games.controls: Left/Right arrows or A/D to rotate around the tunnel
games.objective: Survive the tunnel as long as possible, slipping through gaps in the oncoming barriers.
tips: Focus on the center vanishing point — obstacles read faster there.
Small movements only; big spins make you lose orientation.
Anticipate the tunnel's rotation instead of reacting to it.
If colors distract you, defocus your eyes and track the gaps.

games.title: Snake
games.tagline: Snake is the mobile classic: eat the food, grow longer, and don't run into the walls or your own ever-lengthening tail.
games.controls: Arrow keys to change direction
games.objective: Grow the snake as long as possible without crashing.
tips: Hug a coiling pattern along the edges when you get long.
Never box yourself into a space smaller than your length.
Plan two turns ahead once the tail gets big.
Speed increases with length, so tighten your turns early.

games.title: Madalin Stunt Cars
games.tagline: Madalin Stunt Cars is open-world stunt driving: a huge playground of loops, ramps and jumps with supercars and no rules but physics.
games.controls: WASD or arrows to drive, Space for handbrake, C to change camera, R to reset
games.objective: Explore the map and pull off the biggest stunts you can — loops, barrel rolls and record jumps.
tips: Hit loops at full speed or you'll drop off the ceiling.
Tap the handbrake mid-drift to hold long slides.
Scout the map for the mega ramps before committing.
Reset instantly when you flip to keep the flow going.

games.title: Drive Mad
games.tagline: Drive Mad is a physics driving game where you nurse a fragile monster truck over collapsing bridges, see-saws and ramps without flipping it or losing the cargo.
games.controls: W or Up arrow to accelerate, S or Down arrow to reverse/brake
games.objective: Reach the finish line in one piece across dozens of increasingly ridiculous obstacle levels.
tips: Gentle taps beat full throttle — most flips come from too much speed.
Let the suspension settle before attempting a jump.
Reverse and reposition instead of forcing a bad approach.
Watch the level intro: it usually hints at the gimmick.

games.title: Learn To Fly
games.tagline: Learn to Fly is the penguin launch classic: slide off a ramp, adjust your flight, earn cash for distance and buy gliders, rockets and ramps to fly further.
games.controls: Left/Right arrows to tilt, Space to fire rockets (once unlocked)
games.objective: Fly further and higher each attempt, upgrading your gear until the penguin truly learns to fly.
tips: Upgrade the ramp and glider before rockets — glide efficiency wins early.
Keep a shallow angle for distance records.
Fire rockets at the apex of your glide for maximum range.
Complete the achievement challenges for bonus cash.

games.title: Tetris
games.tagline: Tetris is the timeless puzzle game: rotate falling blocks into complete lines before the stack reaches the top, faster and faster, forever.
games.controls: Left/Right to move, Up to rotate, Down to soft-drop, Space to hard-drop
games.objective: Clear as many lines as you can and survive the rising speed for a high score.
tips: Keep your stack flat — bumps create holes that are hard to fix.
Leave one column open as a well for long I-pieces.
Clearing four lines at once (a Tetris) scores far more than singles.
Look at the next-piece preview and plan two moves ahead.

games.title: Vex 5
games.tagline: Vex 5 is a precision stickman platformer packed with buzzsaws, spikes and disappearing blocks. Run, slide and wall-jump through deadly acts to the exit.
games.controls: WASD or arrows to run and jump, S or Down to slide
games.objective: Reach the end of each act alive. Checkpoints save your progress within a level.
tips: Slide under saws instead of jumping them when the ceiling is low.
Chain wall-jumps with momentum — hesitation drops you into spikes.
Purple blocks vanish and orange blocks bounce; learn their timing.
Touch every checkpoint, even out of the way ones.

games.title: Level Devil
games.tagline: Level Devil is a troll platformer where the level itself lies to you: floors vanish, spikes sprout and the exit door runs away. Trust nothing.
games.controls: Arrow keys or WASD to move, Space or Up to jump
games.objective: Reach the door in each level while the game invents new ways to betray you.
tips: Expect a trap on literally every step of a first attempt.
Move slowly and let traps trigger before you commit.
Memorize trap locations — each level is short and restartable.
Sometimes the 'obvious' path is the only real one; sometimes it isn't.

games.title: Retro Bowl
games.tagline: Retro Bowl mixes arcade football with team management: call the shots on offense, then handle drafts, salaries and morale in a pixel-art front office.
games.controls: Click and drag to aim a pass, release to throw; arrow keys or WASD to dodge defenders after the catch
games.objective: Win games, make the playoffs and lift the Retro Bowl while keeping your roster under the salary cap.
tips: Upgrade your QB first — passing wins games at every difficulty.
A fast wide receiver beats two slow ones; spend on one star.
Run the clock when ahead instead of forcing deep passes.
Trading aging players before they decline keeps the cap healthy.

games.title: Retro Bowl College
games.tagline: Retro Bowl College takes the formula to campus: recruit high-school prospects, keep players eligible and build a college football dynasty.
games.controls: Click and drag to pass, release to throw; arrows or WASD to juke and run
games.objective: Win games and championships while managing recruiting, GPAs and a constantly graduating roster.
tips: Recruit every season — your stars graduate whether you like it or not.
Balance athletics and academics or players go ineligible mid-season.
Freshmen develop fast, so play them early.
Short high-percentage passes keep drives alive on higher difficulties.

games.title: Superhot
games.tagline: SUPERHOT is the shooter where time only moves when you do. Dodge bullets in slow motion, shatter red enemies and turn every level into an action-movie puzzle.
games.controls: WASD to move, mouse to aim, click to shoot, right-click or F to throw/grab weapons
games.objective: Clear every red enemy in each level. Time freezes when you stand still.
tips: Stand still to think — the whole game rewards planning over reflexes.
Throw empty guns at armed enemies to stun and disarm them.
Watch for off-screen spawns marked by the red flash.
Punches and thrown bottles save ammo and buy time.

games.title: Friday Night Funkin
games.tagline: Friday Night Funkin is a rhythm battle game: match arrow notes to the beat in rap battles against a cast of bizarre opponents to win over your girlfriend's dad.
games.controls: Arrow keys (or WASD) to hit notes as they reach the top arrows
games.objective: Out-score each opponent by hitting notes in time across every song and week.
tips: Start on Easy to learn a chart, then move up.
Watch the note lanes, not the characters — the art is a distraction.
Keep your combo alive; misses hurt more than slow sections help.
Use two hands on Hard instead of one-finger tapping.

games.title: Geometry Dash
games.tagline: Geometry Dash is a one-button rhythm platformer where you jump, fly and flip through spike-filled levels synced to pounding soundtracks.
games.controls: Space, Up arrow or mouse click to jump; hold to keep jumping/flying
games.objective: Reach the end of each level without hitting spikes or walls — one mistake restarts the run.
tips: Use practice mode to place checkpoints and learn the layout section by section.
Tap to the beat — obstacle timing matches the music.
Don't watch your icon; watch the obstacles ahead of it.
Short controlled taps beat panic-holding on ship sections.
